caption:
Goa, India’s most iconic beach destination, is now facing a serious environmental warning. A recent study by the National Institute of Oceanography (NIO) has revealed that several Goan beaches rank among the most contaminated along India’s western coastline, raising concerns about long-term ecological and public health impacts. Among samples from 14 beaches across India, Goa recorded the highest concentration of toxic Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons (PAHs)—ranging from 1.9 to 29,500 ng/g in plastic pellets, significantly higher than other regions.

YouTuber and Bigg Boss 17 contestant Anurag Dobhal, widely known as UK07 Rider, was injured after his car crashed into a divider while he was livestreaming on Instagram, according to authorities. Dobhal had recently alleged mental harassment from family members over his inter-caste marriage and during the livestream suggested it could be his “last video.” Following the high-speed crash during the live broadcast, the popular content creator was admitted to the Intensive Care Unit (ICU).
